description: Late letter in Hebrew to Yeḥezqel Ḥefeẓ from Shabbetay ʿAdda, discussing a business partnership, 400 reals, Jerusalem, and people including Pini Lavan (?), Yosef ha-Levi, and Yiṣḥaq Karigal (?). Dates are given both according to the Hebrew calendar and "the Christian calendar."
tags: Yehezqel Hefez, Yosef ha-Levi, Late Heb, 'Adda
